# CBPeripheralManagerOptionRestoreIdentifierKey

**Global Variable**

A unique identifier (UID) with which to instantiate the peripheral manager.

## Declaration

```swift
let CBPeripheralManagerOptionRestoreIdentifierKey: String
```

## Discussion

The value associated with this key is an [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Foundation/NSString].

The system uses this UID to identify a specific peripheral manager. As a result, the UID must remain the same for subsequent executions of the app for successful restoration of the peripheral manager.

## Initialization Options

- **CBPeripheralManagerOptionShowPowerAlertKey**: A Boolean value specifying whether the system should warn if Bluetooth is in the powered-off state when instantiating the peripheral manager.
